Hi! I’m
Shota Shiiku

I am a first-year student at the Graduate School of Integrated Science and Technology, Faculty of Informatics, Shizuoka University

I was born in 2000 and am currently pursuing my graduate studies at the Graduate School of Shizuoka University. I am a member of the Takeuchi Lab, where my primary research focuses on simulating group decision-making processes using reinforcement learning. In addition to my academic pursuits, I enjoy following the NBA and playing basketball.
